title: Tangy Juicy Uruguayan Tomato Toast
description: A bright, kid-friendly toast topped with fresh tomatoes, chives, and a tangy lemon‑olive oil dressing, perfect for a quick snack.

ingredients.name: ripe tomatoes
ingredients.notes: optional: add a pinch of salt to enhance juiciness

instructions: Preheat a toaster or a skillet over medium heat.
Toast the bread slices until golden brown, about 2‑3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic, salt, and pepper to create a dressing.
Spread the dressing evenly over the hot toast.
Top each slice with diced tomatoes, chives, and parsley if using.
Drizzle a small amount of balsamic glaze over the tomatoes for added tang.
Serve immediately while the toast is still warm and the tomatoes are juicy.
